commands.review_summary:
The PR changes `src/llm/providers/anthropic.ts` to compute the Anthropic OAuth `claude-cli/*` user-agent from `claude --version` with a cached fallback instead of a hardcoded version.

PR surface: Source +22. Total +22 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows both Anthropic OAuth request builders can still send `claude-cli/2.1.75`; I did not run a live Anthropic OAuth request because that requires valid user credentials.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs contributor real-behavior proof and maintainer review of the command-execution boundary before any automated repair or merge path is appropriate.

target.title: fix(anthropic): read claudeCodeVersion at runtime to prevent stale user-agent bearer auth failures
target.author: spric76
